description.p: hardware-info-gtk4 presents live CPU, memory, per-GPU, whole-drive usage, connected devices, and battery information in a focused GTK 4 and libadwaita dashboard with recent-history graphs.

A manually controlled adaptive sidebar works across desktop and narrow window sizes. The hardware page provides a selectable static component inventory, while additional thermals, fan speeds, and power readings appear directly on Overview.

The application supports x86-64 and ARM64 Linux systems. On ARM hardware it uses device-tree, thermal-zone, sysfs DRM, and standard kernel interfaces when desktop-style DMI or PCI data is unavailable.
Values depend on the sensors and interfaces exposed by the Linux kernel and installed hardware drivers.
Current development release with live hardware telemetry, connected-device discovery, adaptive navigation, static hardware inventory, and ARM64 support.
